title: StageGuard: Physiologically Constrained Sleep Staging
description: Official implementation of the KDD 2026 AI4Sciences paper 'StageGuard: Physiologically Constrained Sleep Staging'. StageGuard is a plug-and-play, backbone-agnostic structured-inference framework that wraps any neural sleep-staging backbone with physiology-informed priors: a differentiable soft transition penalty during training and a semi-Markov constrained decoder at inference. The repository bundles a small subset of Sleep-Accel PSG hypnograms (labels only) under the ODC-By license for the demo notebook.
